column7: Increases leaf greenness (SPAD value); supports high yield potential through improved canopy photosynthesis.
Boosts early seedling vigor; NPK balance improves transplanting survival and establishment.
Promotes deep green leaf color indicating high N status; sulfur supports enzyme activity.
Boosts stress tolerance and root activity; potassium supports grain filling under heat stress.
Potassium oxide component strengthens cell walls; biostimulant action supports canopy health under humid field conditions.
Nano-potash enhances K uptake efficiency; beneficial fungi improve root colonization and nutrient scavenging.
Root exudates feed beneficial bacteria producing phytohormones; improves tillering response and root biomass of hybrid.
Biological N fixation reduces chemical fertilizer cost; Azolla residue improves soil water retention in irrigated paddies.
Supplemental foliar N at PI improves panicle size; water-soluble K at heading reduces spikelet sterility in hybrid.
